property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\flutter\bin;C:\Users\Paula Argolo\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools\latest\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\Users\Paula Argolo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\Paula Argolo\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Paula Argolo\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Paula Argolo\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;;.

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
16:57:01.584 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.simulador.backend.BackendApplicationTests]: BackendApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 16:57:01.762 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.simulador.backend.BackendApplication for test class com.simulador.backend.BackendApplicationTests 16:57:02.004 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build what is described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Paula Argolo\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.15.11\byte-buddy-agent-1.15.11.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
